query: latest crypto news for Bitcoin and Ethereum
generated_sql: SELECT id, headline, source, url, published_at, sentiment, sentiment_score, related_coins, summary, image_url FROM news ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 6
explanation: I fetched the 6 most recent crypto news articles. Sentiment is analyzed using a fine-tuned FinBERT model with crypto-specific vocabulary.

articles.headline: BlackRock Spot Bitcoin ETF Records $1.2B Weekly Inflow, Largest Since January
articles.summary: BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) saw $1.2 billion in net weekly inflows, the highest since January 2026. The surge follows renewed institutional interest after the Fed's dovish pivot signal last week.

articles.headline: Ethereum Dencun Upgrade Drives Layer-2 Volumes to New All-Time High
articles.summary: Three months post-Dencun, Ethereum L2s are processing $4.2B in daily volume — a new all-time high. Blob space adoption has exceeded expectations, with Base alone accounting for 38% of all blob transactions.

articles.headline: SEC Delays Decision on Spot Ethereum ETF Options Trading
articles.summary: The SEC has postponed its ruling on whether to allow options trading on spot Ethereum ETFs, extending the comment period by 60 days. Market participants had expected a decision this month.

articles.headline: Solana Validator Count Surpasses 3,000 Amid Geographic Decentralization Push
articles.summary: Solana's validator set has grown to 3,012, up from 1,950 a year ago. The distribution now spans 42 countries, with no single cloud provider hosting more than 14% of validators. The Nakamoto coefficient has improved to 28.

articles.headline: Crypto Exchange Reserves Drop to 3-Year Low, Signaling Supply Squeeze
articles.summary: Combined Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange reserves have fallen to 2.12M BTC and 18.4M ETH — the lowest levels since mid-2023. Analysts are divided on whether this signals accumulating HODLers or movement to OTC desks and DeFi protocols.

articles.headline: Binance Withdraws Dubai VASP License Application Amid Regulatory Restructuring
articles.summary: Binance has withdrawn its Virtual Asset Service Provider license application in Dubai, citing a need to restructure its local operations. The decision comes as the exchange faces ongoing regulatory scrutiny across multiple jurisdictions.
